RGB → CMYK SIMULATOR

Compare an RGB image with its CMYK conversion and understand gamut differences.

WHAT YOU'LL LEARN

  • Compare RGB and CMYK colour.
  • Understand colour gamut loss.
  • Visualise converted colours.

HOW IT WORKS

  • Click the simulation buttons.
  • Compare RGB and CMYK panels.
  • Observe the colour swatches and information.

RGB

CMYK Approximation

🦉 OTTO TIP

RGB displays use light, while CMYK printing uses ink. Some bright RGB colours cannot be reproduced accurately in print.

💡 DID YOU KNOW?

  • RGB has a wider gamut than CMYK.
  • Converting RGB to CMYK may reduce saturation.
  • ICC profiles improve colour accuracy.
  • Always soft-proof before printing.
